creator: thierry.dussuet@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 221571
py-vit.shar

Proposing to remove deskutils/vit as it is a very old version, and is orphaned, and replace it by this new version, rewritten in python.
vit is a frontend with vi-like keybindings to deal with taskwarrior databases.
(devel/py-tasklib [1] is a new dependency of this port.)

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=252677
